_comment: Append this object to the array in ~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json. Replace every <ANGLE_BRACKETS> placeholder.
name: <short-id>
_schedule_comment: Standard cron syntax. Daily 7am in this example.
_model_comment: Use a model alias with thinking: 'low'. Reserve high-thinking for interactive.
_prompt_comment: Reference a script file. Do NOT compose shell here - heredoc detection will trip the security gate.

delivery._to_comment: ALWAYS set explicit target. Bare announce with multiple channels picks the wrong one.

elevated._comment: Most cron jobs do not need elevated. Turn on per-job only when needed.
